'''kabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outerly|outerly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outerly|outerly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kabate|kabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kabatesher|kabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kabatesherĂ«m|kabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kabatero|kabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kabateshĂ«|kabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kabateshĂ«m|kabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikabatero|gokikabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikabateshĂ«|gokikabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikabateshĂ«m|gokikabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokabankerom|gokabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokabankeshĂ«|gokabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokabankeshĂ«m|gokabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokabankeya|gokabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kabaterom|kabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kabatemu|kabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kabateya|kabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikabaterom|gokikabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikabatemu|gokikabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikabateya|gokikabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kababate|kababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kababatesher|kababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kababatesherĂ«m|kababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kababatero|kababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kababateshĂ«|kababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kababateshĂ«m|kababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikababatero|gokikababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikababateshĂ«|gokikababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikababateshĂ«m|gokikababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokababankerom|gokababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokababankeshĂ«|gokababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokababankeshĂ«m|gokababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokababankeya|gokababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kababaterom|kababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kababatemu|kababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kababateya|kababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikababaterom|gokikababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikababatemu|gokikababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikababateya|gokikababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠte|kĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠtesher|kĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠtero|kĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠbĂŠtero|gokikĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠterom|kĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠtemu|kĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠbĂŠteya|kĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠbĂŠterom|gokikĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠbĂŠteya|gokikĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafbafte|kafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafbaftesher|kafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafbaftesherĂ«m|kafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafbaftero|kafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafbafteshĂ«|kafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafbafteshĂ«m|kafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafbaftero|gokikafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafbafteshĂ«|gokikafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafbafteshĂ«m|gokikafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafbafnkerom|gokafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafbafnkeshĂ«|gokafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafbafnkeshĂ«m|gokafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafbafnkeya|gokafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafbafterom|kafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafbaftemu|kafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafbafteya|kafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafbafterom|gokikafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafbaftemu|gokikafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafbafteya|gokikafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
